configs.purpose: bounded invalidation/rebind model with reverse-reachability A->B->C, dynamic dependency added/reclassified seeds on B, upstream propagation to C, and rebind-gate rejection before publication

semantic_equivalence_statement: This run checks bounded TLA model evidence only. It does not change invalidation closure, dependency graph construction, dynamic-reference resolution, soft-reference rebind derivation, recalc behavior, evaluation order, TraceCalc behavior, TreeCalc/CoreEngine behavior, publication semantics, rejection policy, OxFml/OxFunc behavior, pack decisions, or service readiness.
